description: You are a detective preparing for a preliminary hearing in a data destruction case. You need to tag relevant evidence on a suspect's USB drive and generate a formal HTML report. Create a new forensic case named 'Court_Prep_2024' with case number 'INV-TAG-006' using the disk image at /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Process the image using only the File Type Identification module. Tag every deleted file found (including those marked with a red X or in $OrphanFiles) as a 'Notable Item' with the comment 'Deleted file - evidence of potential data destruction'. Tag every allocated regular file (excluding system files like $MFT) as 'Follow Up' with the comment 'Active file - content review required for

metadata.expected_notable_comment: Deleted file - evidence of potential data destruction
metadata.expected_followup_comment: Active file - content review required for relevance
